settings.title: Contact Us
settings.intro: Need help? We will find a solution to satisfy you as soon as possible.

settings.question: What is The Shoe Museum?
settings.answer: The Shoe Museum is a museum that collects, preserves, and exhibits shoes. It is a place where you can learn about the history of shoes and see some of the most iconic shoes in the world.

settings.question: With what frequency do you update the content?
How can I contact you?
settings.answer: You can contact us by email at info@theshoemuseum.com.

settings.question: Do you have a physical location?
settings.answer: No, we do not have a physical location.
